stakeholder_priority_conflict.description: When stakeholder priorities conflict, BA must surface conflict transparently

assumptions_documented.description: BA must document all assumptions underlying the analysis

non_goals_surface.description: BA must explicitly surface non-goals (out of scope) before proceeding

surfaced_stakeholder_conflicts.description: Agent surfaced conflicting stakeholder priorities with explicit stakeholder attribution

documented_assumptions.description: Agent documented all assumptions with explicit assumption text

surfaced_non_goals.description: Agent explicitly surfaced non-goals as separate from requirements

no_hidden_conflicts.description: Agent must not suppress stakeholder priority conflicts

no_artifact_without_signoff.description: Agent must not hand off BA artifact without stakeholder sign-off

no_untraced_requirements.description: Agent must not include requirements without stakeholder traceability
